path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad ﷺ/Ali is from Aqa and no one can represent Aqa ﷺ except Ali.png
text: ‘Sunan Ibn Majah » The Book of the Sunnah - et s It was narrated that Hubshi bin Junadah said: *I heard the Messenger of Allah say: "/Ali is part of me and | am part of him, and no one will represent me except 'AliL" Grade: Hasan (Darussalam) Reference = Sunan Tbn Majah 119 In-book reference Introduction, Halth 0 English translation : Vol. 1, Book 1, Hadith 119
